plugin.name: Google Identity
plugin.description: Google OpenID Connect login and registration with PKCE and Workspace domain restrictions.
plugin.settings.title: %s - Plugin Settings
plugin.google.secret_set: Configured; leave blank to keep unchanged
plugin.google.hosted_domain_help: When set, the ID Token hd claim must exactly match this domain.
plugin.google.auto_register_help: This also requires public registration and external identity auto-registration in Site Settings.
plugin.google.callback_help: Add this exact URL to Authorized redirect URIs in Google Cloud Console.
plugin.google.ready: Configuration is complete. The provider is available at /login.
plugin.google.not_ready: Enable the provider and enter both Client ID and Client Secret to show it on the login page.
